title: lantana aculeata f. varia
intro: Lantana aculeata f. varia is a variety of the Lantana camara plant, a shrub native to the Americas and the Caribbean, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers in shades of pink, yellow, and purple. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lantana aculeata f. varia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Lantana aculeata f. varia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
